name: Heaven on Earth
recipeIngredient: 6 large Cooking apples, peeled and cored
4 Ripe pears, peeled, cored and quartered
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F / 190°C.
Place the quartered apples in an ovenproof dish. Add lemon juice and grated rind, and sprinkle sugar over the apples. Cover with buttered greaseproof paper. Bake until the apples soften but before they begin to break up (about 35 minutes).
Lower the oven temperature to 275°F / 140°C.
Add the quartered pears to the dish with the apples. Add lemon rind and juice, and spice. Mix gently.
Cut the cake into cubes and butter generously. Cover the fruit with the cake, butter side up.
Brown slightly under the grill.
Whisk egg whites until they begin to stiffen. Continue whisking, adding caster sugar about 1 tbsp at a time, until about half the sugar is incorporated. Fold in the remaining sugar and spread over the fruit and cake, peaking the meringue with a fork. Bake for about 25 minutes or until the meringue has set.
Serve hot or cold with pouring cream.
